mapper.select: SELECT S.*, L.LECTURE_NAME FROM SCHEDULE S JOIN LECTURE L ON (S.LECTURE_NO = L.LECTURE_NO) WHERE S.MEM_NO = #{memNo} ORDER BY S.SCHEDULE_DAY, S.START_SLOT

SELECT LECTURE_NO, LECTURE_NAME, PROFESSOR_NAME FROM LECTURE WHERE LECTURE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ROWNUM <= 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCHEDULE ( SCHEDULE_NO, MEM_NO, LECTURE_NO, SCHEDULE_TITLE, SCHEDULE_DAY, START_SLOT, END_SLOT) VALUES (SEQ_SCH_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memNo}, #{lectureNo}, #{scheduleTitle}, #{scheduleDay}, #{startSlot}, #{endSlot})
